---
title: ""
date: "2025-01-25"
author: Aude Ines
categories: [Data Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence]
search: true
lightbox: true
image: job.jpeg
listing: 
    contents: "/../../jobandintern"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    date-format: full
    fields: [author,date,title ,image]
---
